title: TSE auto-healing
subtitle: Automatic diagnosis and safe recovery for TSE devices (re-probe / clear errors / optional failover). Does not rewrite fiscal signature chains.
enabledHint: Auto-healing will automatically recover TSE devices when rules match.
allowAutoFailoverHint: Off by default. Failover only when explicitly enabled; no fiscal mutation.
emptySelect: Select a tenant to configure auto-healing.
forbidden: You do not have permission for this page.
diagnosticNote: Operational recovery only (health probe / error text / optional failover). No DEP, certificate, or Startbeleg changes.
